name: p2d
description: Paper-to-Deck — Academic Paper to Presentation Skill Set. Converts an academic paper (PDF) into a polished, audience-tuned slide deck with speaker notes, using a three-stage pipeline: Content Creation (paper ingestion, PSE-anchored outline, drafted slides + notes), Humanization (AI-tell removal + presenter voice personalization), and Visual Enhancement (47-template preview gate + HTML deck). Anti-divergence mechanism locks the paper's Main Contribution Statement (MCS) and Primary Structural Elements (PSE) at ingest, anchoring every downstream stage. Includes cross-artifact consistency review and a reflection loop for progressive presenter improvement.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a conference paper into a presentation deck — 3-stage pipeline with anti-divergence and humanization.

defaultPrompt: Turn a paper into a presentation with @paper-to-deck
Ingest and analyze a paper PDF with @p2d-ingest
Compile the approved slides into an HTML deck with @p2d-compile
